metadata.title: Product Bricks and Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the digital-news-publishing-platform domain.

rootGroups.name: Audience Experience
rootGroups.description: Reader-facing discovery, habit, premium, and utility capabilities.

bricks.name: Front Door and Homepage Orchestration
bricks.description: Editorial and algorithmic assembly of homepages, section fronts, landing pages, and app front doors.

internalModules.title: Homepage assembly service
internalModules.description: Builds ordered story rails and lead packages for each brand and entry surface.

interfaces.title: Front door UI
interfaces.description: Consumer-facing web and app entry surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses package-ready stories with headlines, metadata, and placements.
Uses audience and behavior signals to tailor entry surfaces.

dataDependencies.description: Reads story packages to assemble front doors.
Reads audience profiles for recirculation and layout decisions.

bricks.name: Search and Archive Retrieval
bricks.description: Internal and reader-facing retrieval across stories, topics, people, and archive entities.

internalModules.title: Story index
internalModules.description: Indexes article and package metadata for retrieval and SEO support.

interfaces.title: Search experience
interfaces.description: Reader and internal retrieval experience for current and archived content.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on published story state and metadata from CMS.

dataDependencies.description: Indexes story assets and metadata.

bricks.name: Personalization and Recirculation
bricks.description: Audience-aware ranking, next-story suggestions, and return-journey orchestration across surfaces.

internalModules.title: Recirculation ranking service
internalModules.description: Produces next-best story and repeat-return recommendations.

interfaces.title: Recommendation APIs
interfaces.description: Serves personalized suggestions to homepage, article, and newsletter surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses behavioral and measurement definitions to rank content.

dataDependencies.description: Owns the serving view of audience relevance and recency signals.

bricks.name: Newsletter Lifecycle Management
bricks.description: Newsletter curation, audience targeting, send orchestration, and performance feedback.

internalModules.title: Send orchestration
internalModules.description: Schedules, targets, and tracks newsletter sends.

interfaces.title: Newsletter editor tooling
interfaces.description: Internal interfaces for briefing, curation, and audience selection.

brickDependencies.description: Uses package-ready content for newsletter modules.
Uses reader identity and lifecycle state to tailor sends.

dataDependencies.description: Owns newsletter enrollment and targeting state.

bricks.name: Alerts and Push Messaging
bricks.description: Breaking alerts, app push notifications, and timely prompts that bring readers back.

internalModules.title: Alert dispatch
internalModules.description: Schedules and sends push and breaking alerts by segment and urgency.

interfaces.title: App push surface
interfaces.description: Reader-facing mobile alerts and breaking notifications.

brickDependencies.description: Uses story packaging to turn news into alertable payloads.

dataDependencies.description: Reads reader preferences and device state for notifications.

bricks.name: Article and Story Experience
bricks.description: Core reading experience for articles, galleries, explainers, and premium stories.

internalModules.title: Story rendering engine
internalModules.description: Renders story packages consistently across web and app.

interfaces.title: Article UI
interfaces.description: Reader-facing story and article surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses paywall and entitlement logic for premium content.

dataDependencies.description: Reads complete story packages for rendering.

bricks.name: Video and Visual Storytelling
bricks.description: Short-form and embedded video, visual explainers, and cross-channel media storytelling.

internalModules.title: Video publishing adapter
internalModules.description: Publishes and packages video assets for owned and external channels.

interfaces.title: Video player and embeds
interfaces.description: Reader-facing playback and embedded video experiences.

brickDependencies.description: Uses rights-cleared visual assets and metadata.

dataDependencies.description: Reads media assets and metadata.

bricks.name: Registration and Known User Growth
bricks.description: Registration prompts, account creation flows, and reader-value exchange for becoming known.

internalModules.title: Registration orchestration
internalModules.description: Runs prompts, forms, and lifecycle triggers for account creation.

interfaces.title: Registration UI
interfaces.description: Reader-facing sign-up and profile-capture experiences.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared identity and account state.

dataDependencies.description: Owns reader profile capture and lifecycle state.

bricks.name: Subscription and Paywall Experience
bricks.description: Paywall decisioning, premium packaging, entitlement checks, and upsell flows.

internalModules.title: Paywall rules engine
internalModules.description: Determines access, offer, and package states by reader and content context.

interfaces.title: Paywall and premium UI
interfaces.description: Reader-facing offer, upgrade, and premium-access surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses billing and contract state to decide access.
Uses partner-provided bundle entitlements.

dataDependencies.description: Owns premium access and entitlement state.

bricks.name: Puzzles and Utility Engagement
bricks.description: Recurring utility formats such as puzzles and similar habit-forming experiences.

internalModules.title: Daily utility service
internalModules.description: Publishes recurring interactive utility content and tracks streak-like engagement.

interfaces.title: Puzzle and utility UI
interfaces.description: Reader-facing interactive utility surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses loyalty and repeat-use state for streaks and promotions.

dataDependencies.description: Reads account state for continuity and personalization.

bricks.name: Loyalty, Rewards, and Habit Loops
bricks.description: Loyalty programs, rewards, repeat-use triggers, and streak-like retention mechanics.

internalModules.title: Loyalty rule service
internalModules.description: Applies reward and repeat-use rules across supported experiences.

interfaces.title: Rewards and loyalty UI
interfaces.description: Reader-facing loyalty and rewards surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses known reader identity for portable loyalty benefits.

dataDependencies.description: Reads account state to grant and track benefits.

rootGroups.name: Publishing and Monetization
rootGroups.description: Editorial production, packaging, advertising, commerce, and partner revenue capabilities.

bricks.name: CMS and Workflow Orchestration
bricks.description: Authoring, editing, approvals, publish-state control, and newsroom workflow orchestration.

internalModules.title: Workflow engine
internalModules.description: Coordinates authoring, approvals, and publish states.

interfaces.title: Editorial workbench
interfaces.description: Internal newsroom authoring and workflow interface.

dataDependencies.description: Owns canonical story asset state and editorial workflow.

bricks.name: Asset Management and Rights
bricks.description: Media asset storage, metadata, rights handling, and safe reuse controls.

internalModules.title: Asset rights service
internalModules.description: Tracks media rights, licensing windows, and usage constraints.

interfaces.title: Asset library UI
interfaces.description: Internal media library and rights management interface.

dataDependencies.description: Reads and enriches media assets and metadata.

bricks.name: Live Coverage and Fast Updates
bricks.description: Live blog, rolling updates, and fast-changing story workflows for breaking coverage.

internalModules.title: Live update service
internalModules.description: Handles rolling updates and live chronology management.

interfaces.title: Live coverage UI
interfaces.description: Internal and reader-facing interfaces for live stories and update streams.

brickDependencies.description: Uses CMS state and authoring controls.

dataDependencies.description: Reads and updates story assets in fast cycles.

bricks.name: Story Packaging and Merchandising
bricks.description: Creation of reusable story packages with headlines, decks, links, metadata, and monetization-ready fields.

internalModules.title: Package composer
internalModules.description: Builds reusable packages for homepage, newsletters, paywalls, and destination feeds.

interfaces.title: Package editor UI
interfaces.description: Internal tools for merchandising and package completion.

brickDependencies.description: Uses canonical story assets as package source material.

dataDependencies.description: Owns reusable story package objects.

bricks.name: Distribution Packaging and Syndication
bricks.description: Destination-specific publishing for search, social, app, newsletters, partners, and other external surfaces.

internalModules.title: Destination adapter layer
internalModules.description: Transforms packages into search-, social-, and channel-specific publication payloads.

interfaces.title: Distribution control UI
interfaces.description: Internal controls for scheduling and distributing story packages.

brickDependencies.description: Uses story packages as the source of truth for distribution.

dataDependencies.description: Reads story packages to publish them downstream.

bricks.name: Advertising Operations and Delivery
bricks.description: Campaign booking, pacing, delivery, policy controls, and advertiser operational workflows.

internalModules.title: Campaign delivery core
internalModules.description: Manages campaign pacing, placement constraints, and execution state.

interfaces.title: Ad operations UI
interfaces.description: Commercial interfaces for campaign setup and monitoring.

brickDependencies.description: Uses audience definitions and pricing products.

dataDependencies.description: Owns campaign operational state and delivery settings.

bricks.name: Audience Segmentation and Yield
bricks.description: Creation of commercial audience products, inventory pricing logic, and yield-aware segment packaging.

internalModules.title: Audience product service
internalModules.description: Builds targetable audience cohorts and pricing inputs for direct campaigns.

interfaces.title: Audience planning UI
interfaces.description: Commercial planning and segment definition tooling.

brickDependencies.description: Uses consent-safe activation rules.
Uses performance and value signals to refine segments and pricing.

dataDependencies.description: Reads audience profiles to build commercial audience products.

bricks.name: Commercial Studio and Sponsored Content
bricks.description: Sponsored storytelling, branded packages, and commercial creative operations for portfolio advertisers.

internalModules.title: Sponsor package composer
internalModules.description: Coordinates branded stories, media assets, and sponsorship formats.

interfaces.title: Studio workflow UI
interfaces.description: Internal workflow for commercial and editorially separated sponsor production.

brickDependencies.description: Uses story packaging patterns for sponsor-safe presentation.

dataDependencies.description: Reads campaign and sponsor package setup.

bricks.name: Affiliate Commerce and eCommerce
bricks.description: Commerce links, shopping experiences, commission tracking, and editorial-commerce optimization.

internalModules.title: Commerce attribution service
internalModules.description: Tracks attributed commerce events and commission settlement inputs.

interfaces.title: Commerce module UI
interfaces.description: Reader-facing commerce modules and shop surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses package metadata to insert relevant commerce units.

dataDependencies.description: Owns commerce attribution and commission state.

bricks.name: Partner Bundles and Wholesale Subscriptions
bricks.description: Wholesale subscription packaging, partner entitlement sync, and bundle lifecycle management.

internalModules.title: Partner entitlement broker
internalModules.description: Handles partner activation and access-state synchronization.

interfaces.title: Partner bundle APIs
interfaces.description: Partner-facing integration surface for access and lifecycle events.

brickDependencies.description: Uses subscription access logic for bundle users.
Uses contract and settlement state for wholesale relationships.

dataDependencies.description: Reads bundle contract and entitlement state.

bricks.name: Events and Experience Extensions
bricks.description: Event products, subscriber experiences, and premium extensions such as New Scientist Live or related member experiences.

internalModules.title: Experience entitlement service
internalModules.description: Links events and member experiences to reader identity and product packaging.

interfaces.title: Events and experiences UI
interfaces.description: Reader-facing event discovery and member experience surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses subscription and member state for eligibility.

dataDependencies.description: Reads member and entitlement state for experience access.

rootGroups.name: Trust Data and Foundations
rootGroups.description: Identity, privacy, measurement, experimentation, and revenue foundations.

bricks.name: Identity and Account Platform
bricks.description: Account, login, session, and profile infrastructure for readers, subscribers, and partners.

internalModules.title: Account core
internalModules.description: Manages account, session, and profile state.

interfaces.title: Account APIs
interfaces.description: Identity services used across reader, subscription, and partner flows.

dataDependencies.description: Reads and updates customer profile state.
Reads credential state for secure access.

bricks.name: Consent and Privacy Controls
bricks.description: Consent capture, policy enforcement, and privacy-safe activation controls across reader and advertiser flows.

internalModules.title: Consent rules engine
internalModules.description: Evaluates consent state and activation policy.

interfaces.title: Consent banner and controls
interfaces.description: Reader-facing privacy and consent management interfaces.

dataDependencies.description: Owns auditable consent and preference history.

bricks.name: Analytics, Measurement, and Insight
bricks.description: Shared KPI definitions, reporting, audience insight, and commercial measurement across the domain.

internalModules.title: Metrics semantic layer
internalModules.description: Defines shared customer, subscriber, editorial, and commercial metrics.

interfaces.title: Insight dashboards
interfaces.description: Internal and selected external reporting surfaces.

dataDependencies.description: Reads campaign performance for advertiser measurement.
Reads experiment results to guide product decisions.

bricks.name: Experimentation and Decisioning
bricks.description: A/B testing, decision flags, and controlled rollout support across reader, commercial, and editorial journeys.

internalModules.title: Experiment runtime
internalModules.description: Controls experiment assignment and rollout state.

interfaces.title: Experiment console
interfaces.description: Internal interface for configuring, monitoring, and closing experiments.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared metrics to evaluate product and monetization experiments.

dataDependencies.description: Owns experiment definitions, cohorts, and outcomes.

bricks.name: Billing and Revenue Operations
bricks.description: Subscription billing, renewals, settlement, and monetization exception handling across direct and partner channels.

internalModules.title: Subscription ledger
internalModules.description: Tracks contracts, renewals, payment state, and revenue events.

interfaces.title: Billing operations UI
interfaces.description: Internal tooling for payment, renewal, and exception management.

dataDependencies.description: Owns subscription contract and revenue state.
